description_long: This is a large, bulbous clay vase with a wide, rounded body tapering to a small base and a short, flared neck. The surface is matte and dark brown, showing signs of age and wear, with subtle linear markings and patches of discoloration. A prominent decorative face or mask is sculpted onto the neck, adding a unique ornamental detail. The rim is thick and slightly uneven, suggesting handcrafting. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding water or decorative items. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, yet the sculpted embellishment gives it a distinctive character.
description: A large, dark brown clay vase with a rounded body, flared neck, and a sculpted face ornament on the neck. The surface is matte and aged, with subtle linear markings.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from an angle highlighting its rounded body and the sculpted face on the neck, with the rim and base both visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the vase directly from the front, clearly displaying the sculpted face ornament and the symmetrical shape of the body.
description_view_2: The vase is viewed from the opposite side, with the sculpted face partially visible and the curvature of the body emphasized.
description_view_3: The back of the vase is shown, with no visible ornamentation and a smooth, continuous surface.
